text:
Market today: Tech is getting hammered today. Concerns over AI spending spooked investors, sending major players like Tesla and Alphabet down hard. This sets a negative tone for your concentrated tech/chip portfolio.

Your holdings: Your leveraged chip ETF SOXL is a SELL, down nearly 40%. SPAL, another leveraged ETF, is a NEW position but already down over 54%. QQQI is also a SELL with its stop at 52 very close. Margin amplifies these drops.

Watch: Monitor overall tech sector sentiment closely. Any further news on AI spending or big tech earnings will be critical for your book.

Bottom line: Tech is under significant pressure; focus on managing risk, especially on your leveraged and underperforming positions.
plays: Respect the stop on QQQI at 52 to limit further losses.
Given the tech weakness and your concentrated book, consider trimming QQQ and SMH, both currently on TRIM status.
No new buys today - hold and watch. The sector is under pressure, and there's no strong catalyst for new long positions.
